# Allowed workflow secrets for ChittyFinance
# Each line is a secret name that workflows may reference

ORG_AUTOMATION_TOKEN
OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN
GITLEAKS_LICENSE
CHITTYFINANCE_SERVICE_TOKEN
OPENAI_API_KEY
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
WAVE_CLIENT_SECRET
